title: Bounty System
description: a simple bounty system to make your servers more fun
body:
### 🪙 Bounty Mod

The **Bounty Mod** adds a simple and easy-to-use **bounty system** to Minecraft. Players can place bounties on other players, adjust them, and view all active bounties on a bounty board.

Perfect for SMPs, PvP servers, or anyone who wants to add extra risk and rewards to survival gameplay.

#### 🔧 Features

* Set bounties on players
* Adjust existing bounties
* View all active bounties on a bounty board
* Simple and intuitive commands

#### 📜 Commands

* `/setbounty <player> <amount>` – Set a bounty on a player
* `/adjustbounty <player> <amount>` – Adjust an existing bounty
* `/bountyboard` – View all current bounties
* `/helpbounty` – Show all available commands

#### 🎯 Goal

More danger. More rewards. More fun.
